records.heading: Observe RHP-015.8 sealed commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-015.9 starts from the already-published RHP-015.8 seal.

records.heading: Render non-executing autoheal proposal plan
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.autoheal_proposal_planner --wound-class remote_ci_pending --subject commit:f09b86e4152ef6257166647c6d02d2f67ca8e0f4 --current-head-ci-status pending --source operator-provided --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-9-autoheal-proposal-planner-wound-queue\autoheal-proposal-plan.json
records.why: Convert active wound state into a proposal packet while execution remains disabled.

records.heading: Render doctor-surfaced wound queue
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.wound_queue --current-head f09b86e4152ef6257166647c6d02d2f67ca8e0f4 --current-head-ci-status pending --source operator-provided --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-9-autoheal-proposal-planner-wound-queue\wound-queue.json
records.why: Surface active wound/proposal state for doctor/operator without executing repair.

records.heading: Run doctor with bounded operation dirty mode
records.why: Confirm cockpit can classify state while this authorized operation is constructing bounded files.

records.heading: Compile RHP-015.9 planner/queue surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/autoheal_proposal_planner.py rhp/wound_queue.py tests/test_rhp_015_9_autoheal_proposal_planner.py tests/test_rhp_015_9_wound_queue.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run planner/queue focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_015_9_autoheal_proposal_planner.py tests/test_rhp_015_9_wound_queue.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_proposal_packet.py
records.why: Prove proposal planner, wound queue, taxonomy, and proposal packets before push.
